fact_labels.extracted: URL ownership and the first ten priority URLs come from docs/seo/SEARCH_BASELINE_AND_PRIORITY_PAGES_2026-07-18.md.
fact_labels.interpreted: Intent keys, differentiation notes and conflict flags are pilot governance decisions pending current GSC query-to-page evidence.

entries.user_job: Decide whether Ubud is the right Bali base for the trip.
entries.decision_output: A conservative base-fit orientation with handoffs to existing activity, itinerary, food and wellness owners.
entries.subject: area-base
entries.differentiation_note: Owns whether Ubud is the right base and high-level planning labels; existing specialist pages own attractions, itineraries and venue decisions.

entries.user_job: Decide whether Uluwatu is the right Bali base for the trip.
entries.decision_output: A conservative scope and base-fit orientation with handoffs to narrower existing owners.
entries.subject: area-base
entries.differentiation_note: Owns whether Uluwatu is the right base and the planning-label scope; existing children own food, sunset and itinerary decisions.

entries.user_job: Decide whether Sanur is the right Bali base for the trip.
entries.decision_output: A fit and trade-off orientation with links to narrower Sanur decisions.
entries.subject: area-base
entries.differentiation_note: Owns whether Sanur is the right base; the stay guide owns the narrower location decision inside Sanur.

entries.user_job: Choose which part of Sanur to stay in before choosing a hotel.
entries.decision_output: A location-first comparison of central, south and north Sanur and beachfront versus inland trade-offs.
entries.subject: stay-zone
entries.differentiation_note: Owns the zone and location decision; /sanur owns base fit and /sanur/best-hotels owns individual hotel selection.

entries.user_job: Choose a cafe in Canggu suitable for a work session.
entries.decision_output: A Canggu-specific shortlist with practical work-fit trade-offs.
entries.subject: work-friendly-cafes
entries.differentiation_note: Owns the Canggu-only decision; the collection owner is Bali-wide. Verify that Google users and page inventory actually preserve this distinction.

entries.user_job: Choose where to have brunch in Canggu.
entries.decision_output: A Canggu brunch shortlist with reasons and trade-offs.
entries.subject: brunch
entries.differentiation_note: Owns brunch selection in Canggu; breakfast and coffee pages require a different decision output before approval.

entries.user_job: Compare restaurants in Canggu for a meal decision.
entries.decision_output: A Canggu dining shortlist grouped by decision context.
entries.subject: restaurants
entries.differentiation_note: Owns broad restaurant comparison in Canggu; narrower cuisine or scenario pages need a demonstrably separate user job.

entries.user_job: Choose a cafe or coffee stop in Ubud.
entries.decision_output: An Ubud-specific cafe and coffee shortlist.
entries.subject: cafes-coffee
entries.differentiation_note: Owns general cafe and coffee selection in Ubud until GSC proves distinct specialty-coffee or breakfast intent.

entries.user_job: Choose an Uluwatu beach club for sunset.
entries.decision_output: A sunset-specific beach-club comparison for Uluwatu.
entries.subject: beach-clubs
entries.differentiation_note: Owns beach-club choice within Uluwatu; the Bali-wide sunset guide owns cross-island sunset-spot comparison.

entries.user_job: Compare restaurants in Seminyak for a meal decision.
entries.decision_output: A Seminyak dining shortlist grouped by decision context.
entries.subject: restaurants
entries.differentiation_note: Owns broad restaurant comparison in Seminyak; no alias page may duplicate it.

entries.user_job: Compare warungs across Bali for local food.
entries.decision_output: An island-wide shortlist with geographic and practical trade-offs.
entries.subject: warungs
entries.differentiation_note: Owns Bali-wide warung comparison; district pages must remain narrower and locally useful.

entries.user_job: Choose where to watch sunset across Bali.
entries.decision_output: A cross-island sunset comparison by area and experience.
entries.subject: sunset-spots
entries.differentiation_note: Owns island-wide sunset-place comparison; area and venue-type pages remain narrower spokes.

entries.user_job: Decide whether Jari Menari Seminyak fits the visitor's needs.
entries.decision_output: Verified venue facts, fit, limitations and an official next action.
entries.subject: venue
entries.differentiation_note: Owns the entity-specific decision; collection cards may summarize but cannot replace the canonical venue page.

entries.user_job: Decide whether Pizza Fabbrica Canggu fits the visitor's needs.
entries.decision_output: Verified venue facts, fit, limitations and an official next action.
entries.subject: venue
entries.differentiation_note: Owns the entity-specific decision; no district-keyword alias URL is allowed.

entries.user_job: Orient a first-time visitor through the first Bali day without over-planning.
entries.decision_output: Bali-wide day-one orientation: choose one base, keep travel local and book only key moments.
entries.subject: first-day
entries.differentiation_note: Owns Bali-wide first-day orientation and base choice; the route page should own a sequenced Canggu day. The overlap is real enough to require GSC and editorial review.

entries.user_job: Follow a practical first-day route in Canggu.
entries.decision_output: A sequenced local route with stops, timing and fallback.
entries.subject: first-day
entries.differentiation_note: Owns a sequenced Canggu day, not general Bali arrival planning. The generic slug increases ambiguity and requires GSC review before any rename.

entries.decision_output: A Bali-wide comparison that helps choose an area and venue for work.
entries.subject: work-friendly-cafes
entries.differentiation_note: Owns cross-island comparison; the Canggu page owns a decision within Canggu. Current GSC must confirm that both deserve separate ownership.
